_comment: Slice 100: i18n scaffold. Default English strings. Add new locales as web/i18n/<bcp47>.json. The marketing.js lookup falls back to en.json when a key is missing in the requested locale.
hero.kicker: The e-signature tool that respects your time.
hero.lede: Every signature line, initial, date, and checkbox in your document, located before you start placing them by hand. Signers click a link and sign. No accounts. No friction.
